topic: Claude API 300K Output Tokens: Guide to Long-Form Generation (2026)

stats.fact: Claude Message Batches API supports up to 300,000 output tokens per request using the output-300k-2026-03-24 beta header, released March 30, 2026
Standard synchronous Messages API maximum output is 32,000 tokens; Batch API with beta header extends this ~9x to 300,000 tokens
Claude Sonnet 4.6 pricing: $3/M input, $15/M output — with 50% batch discount, 300K output costs ~$2.25
Claude Opus 4.6 pricing: $5/M input, $25/M output — 300K output via batch costs ~$3.75
Gemini 2.5 Pro max output is 64K tokens, making Claude batch 300K output ~4.7x larger capacity
300,000 tokens ≈ 225,000 words ≈ 900 pages of English text (at ~0.75 words per token)
Claude Sonnet 4.6 SWE-bench score: 79.6%; OSWorld computer use score: 72.5% (34+ points ahead of GPT-5.4)
Supported models for 300K output: claude-opus-4-7, claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-6

Prompt caching provides up to 90% cost savings; batch processing provides 50% cost savings on top of base pricing
